title: AI Trading Bots Revolutionize Global Markets | Tech Trend 2026
description: Discover how AI trading bots are transforming investment strategies worldwide, with a 40% surge in crypto and 28% in stock markets. SoFi's acquisition of Composer and Toobit's AI Trading Assistant are leading the charge. #AITrading #Fintech #InvestingTrends #TechTrend2026
